meta.project: osm pr-split — fix spawn/toggle/exit failures + expand robustness
meta.scope: Fix the osm pr-split command that exits immediately when using -claude-command=ollama. Harden the spawn-attach-toggle-detach lifecycle. Expand integration tests. Iterate indefinitely toward TRUE PERFECTION.
meta.maintenanceInstruction: KEEP THE PLAN UP TO DATE AS YOU EVOLVE THE CODE. DEVIATIONS TO THE PLAN MUST BE LOGGED WITHIN THE PLAN. THE PLAN MUST BE REASSESSED HOLISTICALLY AFTER ANY CHANGE OF ANY SIZE.
meta.completionPolicy: YOU ARE NOT DONE UNTIL YOU HAVE COMPLETED 100% OF THE BLUEPRINT. DO NOT STOP. YOU MUST REFINE AT REGULAR INTERVALS TO KEEP THE BLUEPRINT FULL. NEVER SPECIFY ANY ESTIMATE OF EFFORT OR COST. NEVER SPECIFY A PRIORITY OF ANY KIND.

globalAlerts.warning: ALL build/test commands must be run via GNU Make. NEVER run go test ad-hoc without -race flag.
NEVER add entries to .deadcodeignore. If deadcode fails, wire up the code or delete it.
Tests MUST NOT mutate host state. Use t.TempDir(), t.Setenv().
Cross-platform: ALL code must work on linux, macos, windows.
github.com/mattn/go-runewidth is BANNED. Use github.com/rivo/uniseg ONLY.

mandatoryDirectives.contextManagement: Tasks are flat and sequential. Execute in order. On session resume, read blueprint.json and WIP.md, find the first non-Done task, and continue.

statusSection.currentState: T001-T031 Done. Coverage gap tests: mcp_instance flags, concurrent statusbar, cleanupExecutor ordering. Commits: 10f7d91 (9 fixes), 25632c6 (14 unit tests), 8d14711 (spawn+health tests), d71b999 (isAlive+sendToHandle). Pending commit for T026-T031.
statusSection.goalState: osm pr-split works correctly with -claude-command=ollama (and all other providers). The spawn-switch-send-classify pipeline is robust: dead child detected before passthrough entry, diagnostic output surfaced, re-attach is safe (no goroutine leaks), the VTerm captures error output. Integration tests cover the full spawn-to-exit lifecycle. Zero goroutine leaks. Zero EAGAIN errors. Zero data loss on re-attach.
replanLog: 2026-02-28: Previous session blueprint (T001-T131, termmux rewrite) was 100% Done. This new blueprint covers the pr-split spawn/toggle failures discovered in production.
2026-02-28: Added T006 (ReadLoop context cancellation) after discovering goroutine leak during re-attach of same Claude handle.

sequentialTasks.task: Fix explicit provider type flag handling in spawn
sequentialTasks.description: In pr_split_script.js spawn(), the explicit type path was unconditionally prepending --dangerously-skip-permissions. Changed to detect provider type from command basename: only prepend if basename contains claude.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: When -claude-command=ollama is used, --dangerously-skip-permissions is NOT prepended. When -claude-command=claude is used, it IS prepended.

sequentialTasks.task: Add post-spawn health check in ClaudeCodeExecutor
sequentialTasks.description: After registry.spawn() returns a handle, wait 0.3s then check handle.isAlive(). If dead, capture output via handle.receive() and return diagnostic error.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: A process that exits within 0.3s of spawn is detected with descriptive error including process output.

sequentialTasks.task: Add isAlive() guards before attach/switchToClaude
sequentialTasks.description: The claude command handler and auto-split attach path now check isAlive() before proceeding. If dead, surface diagnostics.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: No panic or hang when entering passthrough with a dead child. User sees Claude process has exited message.

sequentialTasks.task: Surface child exit output in switchToClaude response
sequentialTasks.description: switchToClaude binding calls tuiMux.ChildExitOutput() on ExitChildExit, includes childOutput in response. Requires Mux.ChildExitOutput() and VTerm.String().
sequentialTasks.acceptance: When Claude exits during passthrough, user sees process last terminal output. VTerm.String() returns clean plain text.

sequentialTasks.task: Handle re-attach gracefully via attachChild helper
sequentialTasks.description: attachChild helper catches ErrAlreadyAttached, detaches first, retries. Detach binding tolerates ErrDetached.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Attach after Attach does not panic. Detach when nothing attached does not panic.

sequentialTasks.task: Fix goroutine leak on Detach: cancel ReadLoop context
sequentialTasks.description: Attach() creates cancellable context for ReadLoop. Detach() calls cancel before waiting for teeDone.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: After Detach, ReadLoop context is cancelled. No goroutine accumulation on re-attach cycles. All tests pass with -race.

sequentialTasks.task: Delete unused VTerm.CursorPos() (deadcode)
sequentialTasks.description: CursorPos() had no consumer. Deleted per AGENTS.md deadcode policy.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: make lint passes. CursorPos() no longer exists.

sequentialTasks.task: Rule of Two verification (Pass 1: lint + targeted tests)
sequentialTasks.description: Subagent verifies: make build, make lint, make integration-test-termmux, make test-pr-split-pty.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: All four make targets pass with exit code 0.

sequentialTasks.task: Rule of Two verification (Pass 2: full test suite)
sequentialTasks.description: Second subagent runs make test. Confirms zero failures across all packages.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: make test passes with exit code 0. All packages ok.

sequentialTasks.task: Commit the fixes as a coherent changeset
sequentialTasks.description: Committed as 10f7d91. 5 files, 282 insertions, 938 deletions.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: git log shows new commit on wip branch. git diff HEAD is empty.

sequentialTasks.task: Add unit test for VTerm.String() plain-text rendering
sequentialTasks.description: In vt_test.go: empty VTerm, ASCII text, wide chars, ANSI stripped, trailing spaces stripped, trailing empty lines trimmed.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: TestVTerm_String passes with -race. All 6 scenarios covered.

sequentialTasks.task: Add test for Mux.ChildExitOutput() lifecycle
sequentialTasks.description: In termmux_test.go: TestChildExitOutput_EmptyBeforeAttach, TestChildExitOutput_CapturesChildOutput, TestChildExitOutput_EmptyAfterDetach. All 3 scenarios covered.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: TestChildExitOutput passes with -race.

sequentialTasks.task: Add test for Detach ReadLoop context cancellation
sequentialTasks.description: In termmux_test.go: TestDetach_CancelsReaderContext verifies context cancel takes effect when child produces data. TestDetach_ReattachSingleReadLoop verifies re-attach captures only new child output.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: TestDetach_CancelsReaderContext and TestDetach_ReattachSingleReadLoop pass with -race.

sequentialTasks.task: Add test for attachChild ErrAlreadyAttached retry
sequentialTasks.description: In termmux_test.go: TestAttach_AfterDetach_Succeeds verifies the Attach→ErrAlreadyAttached→Detach→Attach pattern works correctly.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Test passes. Second child connected without panic.

sequentialTasks.acceptance: Cold-start agent can resume immediately from WIP.md.

sequentialTasks.task: Run full make pipeline after all tests added

sequentialTasks.acceptance: Exit code 0. All packages pass.

sequentialTasks.task: Add explicit type basename detection spawn args tests
sequentialTasks.description: In pr_split_integration_test.go: Two new cases added to TestIntegration_SpawnArgs_DangerouslySkipPermissions: explicit type with 'claude' in path (should have --dangerously-skip-permissions), explicit type with non-claude command (should NOT have it).
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Both cases pass. Explicit basename detection is verified for both positive and negative cases.

sequentialTasks.task: Add post-spawn health check tests
sequentialTasks.description: In pr_split_integration_test.go: TestIntegration_SpawnHealthCheck_DeadProcess (mock handle where isAlive() returns false, verify diagnostic error includes process output) and TestIntegration_SpawnHealthCheck_AliveProcess (mock handle where isAlive() returns true, verify success).
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Both tests pass with -race. Dead process is detected with diagnostic output. Alive process returns success.

sequentialTasks.acceptance: Two PASS verdicts on same diff.

sequentialTasks.task: Add isAlive guard tests for both paths
sequentialTasks.description: 6 tests added: 3 in pr_split_test.go (dead_handle_surfaces_diagnostics, dead_handle_empty_output, dead_handle_receive_throws) testing claude command handler isAlive guard; 3 in pr_split_integration_test.go (AutoSplitAttach dead, alive, missing-isAlive) testing auto-split attach guard.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: All 6 tests pass with -race. Dead handle detection, diagnostic surfacing, empty output, and receive-throws edge cases all verified.

sequentialTasks.task: Add sendToHandle TUI path + cancellation tests
sequentialTasks.description: 2 tests added in pr_split_integration_test.go: TestIntegration_SendToHandle_TUIPath (mock autoSplitTUI.sendWithCancel, verify two-write pattern text+Enter) and TestIntegration_SendToHandle_TUIPath_FirstSendError (verify cancellation on first write stops second write). Complements existing fallback-path tests.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Both tests pass with -race. TUI path two-write pattern verified. Error on first write prevents second write.
